title: Victoria Cross for Australia awarded to The Late Private Richard Leslie Norden
body: For most conspicuous acts of gallantry in action in the presence of the enemy in the ‘AO Surfers’ Area of Operations in the Bien Hoa province, Vietnam, on 14 May 1968 during the Battle of Fire Support Base Coral. Award date: 2024-10-01.

title: Victoria Cross for Australia awarded to Ordinary Seaman Edward Sheean
body: Recipient record in the attached Australian Honours Search. Award date: 2020-12-01.

title: Victoria Cross for Australia awarded to Corporal Cameron Stewart Baird
body: For the most conspicuous acts of valour, extreme devotion to duty and ultimate self-sacrifice at Ghawchak village, Uruzgan Province, Afghanistan as a Commando Team Commander in Special Operations Task Group on Operation SLIPPER. Award date: 2014-02-18.

title: Victoria Cross for Australia awarded to Corporal Daniel Keighran
body: For the most conspicuous acts of gallantry and extreme devotion to duty in action in circumstances of great peril at Derapet, Uruzgan Province, Afghanistan as part of the Mentoring Task Force One on Operation SLIPPER. Award date: 2012-11-02.

title: Victoria Cross for Australia awarded to Corporal Benjamin Roberts-Smith
body: For the most conspicuous gallantry and daring in the face of the enemy while in circumstances of extreme peril as a Patrol Second-in-Command, Special Operations Task Group on Operation SLIPPER. Award date: 2011-01-23.

title: Victoria Cross for Australia awarded to Trooper Mark Gregor Donaldson
body: For most conspicuous acts of gallantry in action in a circumstance of great peril in Afghanistan, as part of the Special Operations Task Group during Operations SLIPPER, Oruzgan Province, Afghanistan. Award date: 2009-01-16.
